mission: M5 Extremal Geometry of Budgeted Inspection
model: finite worlds; deterministic globally addressable unit-cost queries unless stated; worst-case budget; transcript excludes terminal decision

claims.title: Active support r <= B+1 implies no adaptivity gap
Budget-two root-arity bound D_ad <= K D_na
claims.novelty: requires comparison with active testing and feature acquisition

claims.title: Sharp extremal law G_2(K)=1-1/K
claims.novelty: candidate sharp finite adaptivity law; do not publicize as new

claims.title: Four-active-world binary extremizer is the butterfly
Near factor-two equality forces branch balance and locality
claims.novelty: not claimed; launch point for a metric stability theorem

claims.title: k-pair habitat: unbounded gap envelope + greedy failure
claims.novelty: habitat packaging; not the sharp universal envelope
claims.product_scar: static smell suite does not bound adaptive T1; myopic local-first arbitrarily bad

claims.title: Exact support-constrained curve G_2(K,r)

claims.title: Distance-to-extremizer stability theorem

claims.title: Sharp adaptivity law for B >= 3
